title: Clinical Data Coordinator
description: GSK is a science-led global healthcare company with a mission to discover, develop, and deliver health solutions. You'll manage clinical trial data ensuring regulatory compliance and data integrity.
responsibilities: Manage and validate data from clinical trials
Prepare case report forms and source documentation
Resolve data discrepancies and ensure regulatory compliance
Support database development and quality assurance
Prepare regulatory submissions and audit responses
Track protocol deviations and manage data changes

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in healthcare-related field or equivalent experience
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of clinical data management or clinical research experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
